desktop_api.description: Please make sure to follow the steps explained [here]({release_url}) on how to get your Access & Refresh Tokens.

pick_implementation.title: Application Credentials
pick_implementation.description: Select the application credentials to use for this account.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Spotcast
reauth_confirm.description: The Spotcast integration needs to re-authenticate your account.

desktop_auth.title: Desktop authorization
desktop_auth.description: Spotcast needs a second authorization using the Spotify desktop application identity. Choose how to complete it.

menu_options.desktop_api_manual: Paste the redirect URL (recommended, no extra software)

desktop_api_manual.title: Paste the redirect URL
desktop_api_manual.description:
1. Open [this authorization link]({authorize_url}) and log in and authorize if asked.
2. Your browser will then try to open `http://127.0.0.1:8080/login...` and show a connection error. This is expected.
3. Copy the full address from your browser's address bar and paste it below.

doc_confirm.title: Start Setup
doc_confirm.description: Please follow the [setup guide]({setup_guide}) before continuing.

error.invalid_url: That does not look like a valid redirect URL. Copy the full address from your browser's address bar.
error.access_denied: Authorization was denied. Open the link again and allow access.
error.missing_code: The pasted URL does not contain an authorization code. Copy the full address from your browser's address bar.
error.invalid_state: The pasted URL does not match this setup attempt. Restart the setup and try again.
error.token_request_failed: Could not exchange the authorization code with Spotify. Authorization codes are single-use, so open the link again for a fresh one.

abort.connection_error: Unable to connect to Spotify using the {account_type} credentials. If you are upgrading from v5, note that the configuration process changed completely in v6. Make sure to follow the [installation guide]({release_url}). For more help, [open a ticket]({ticket_url}).
abort.already_configured: This account is already configured in Home Assistant
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: The account provided does not match the account being reauthenticated
abort.public_private_accounts_mismatch: The profile from the OAuth credentials and the desktop credentials are for 2 different accounts. Make sure to provide information from the same account. If you are already logged in to Spotify on your browser, Home Assistant won't ask you to connect to a different account and will use the currently logged-in user.

data.set_default: Set the current account as the default Spotcast account

data_description.base_refresh_rate: How often (in seconds) Spotcast refreshes the account data from Spotify.
data_description.stale_device_timeout: Days before an unavailable device and its entity are removed. 0 removes them immediately.
data_description.device_filter_mode: Deny ignores devices matching the patterns. Allow only creates entities for matching devices.
data_description.device_filter_patterns: Comma-separated device names, case insensitive, wildcards allowed. Example: `*Jam*, Pixel 7 Pro`. Leave empty to keep every device.
